title: From the Mission to the Marina — The Long Way
firstCaption: Wheels rolling at 7:23 AM from the Mission — coffee was still brewing when the engine turned over.

title: Night Freight: Oakland to San Jose
firstCaption: 2:11 AM. Container lights flicker across the water. The van rolls out into the dark with a full load and nowhere to be but south.

title: Bay Bridge to Berkeley: A Field Guide
firstCaption: Departing at 8:45 AM from the Embarcadero — the Bay Bridge toll plaza ahead, traffic index 0.6, light winds from the west.

title: The Great Depot Escape
firstCaption: Short trip. Big energy. The van left the depot before anyone had a chance to add more items to the manifest.

title: Fog, Freeways, and a Very Patient Driver
firstCaption: The fog hadn't lifted. It wouldn't for hours. Van 07 pushed west through the grey towards the coast.

title: Corridor Report: I-880 Southbound
firstCaption: Fremont at 10:15 AM. The I-880 south corridor — 42 km, four distinct traffic zones, and one memorable interchange.

title: Eleven Stops and a Miracle Parking Spot
firstCaption: The plan said three stops. The day had other ideas. Stop one: a double-park on Clay Street with emergency flashers blazing.

title: The Last Run Before Maintenance Day
firstCaption: Fleet Van 03 was due for service at 8 AM. At 7:15 AM it was still on the road. This is that story.

title: Golden Gate Approach: A Driver's Reference
firstCaption: Presidio Gate at 7:00 AM. Golden Gate Bridge approach protocol: keep right, watch cyclists, prepare for wind at midspan.

title: Bridge Toll Roulette: 47 Attempts, 1 EZ-Pass
firstCaption: Fleet record: Van 12 crossed the Bay Bridge 47 times this quarter. It has beeped through the toll exactly once. Nobody knows how.

title: Rain, Highway 101, and a Delayed Delivery
firstCaption: The rain started at mile 12. By mile 18, the wipers were losing. Van 05 pressed south on 101 through curtains of water.

title: Outer Sunset Loop: Terrain & Traffic Analysis
firstCaption: Ocean Beach departure at 3:45 PM. Outer Sunset grid: one-way conflicts at 45th Ave, pedestrian density at Irving Street, fog advisory active.
